chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1363 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.6094/2025 (C/A) 06-10-2025 Mr. Muhammad Nawaz Qazi, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Respondent No.3 Iftikhar Ahmed Arain, Conservator of Forests, Afforestation Circle, Sukkur for self and on behalf of Respondents No.1 and 2 >>>>>..<<<<< No application in compliance of paragraph 4 has been submitted by the Petitioner. Under the circumstances, no case of contempt is made out. The listed Contempt Application is dismissed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
